title: Predicting the SpaceX, OpenAI, and Anthropic IPOs — With Dick Costolo
summary: Dick Costolo, ex-CEO of Twitter, discusses predictions and analysis of potential IPOs for SpaceX, OpenAI, and Anthropic. The conversation covers IPO logistics, differences between the companies, capital sources, AI platform characteristics, and broader implications for the AI industry.
